holdings.infoBox: USSE is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.11%, ATI Inc. at 6.91%, NVIDIA at 6.62%, Palo Alto Networks at 5.74%, and Microsoft at 5.70%.

overview.description: The Segall Bryant & Hamill Select Equity ETF (USSE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks long-term capital appreciation by investing in US companies of any size. Investments are managed based on quantitative analysis, fundamental research, and ESG practices, selecting companies believed to have the potential for superior returns. USSE was launched on Aug 29, 2023 and is issued by Segall Bryant & Hamill.
